title: ilex malaccensis var. malaccensis
intro: Ilex malaccensis var. malaccensis is a variety of the Malayan evergreen tree, scientifically known as Ilex malaccensis, which is native to Southeast Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its leaves and bark, which contain compounds with antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ilex malaccensis var. malaccensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures.
